privileged_info_summary: This task involves configuring WooCommerce review settings and adding customer reviews to two products. The Wireless Bluetooth Headphones product (SKU: WBH-001) requires a 5-star review containing the keyword 'noise cancellation'. The Organic Cotton T-Shirt product (SKU: OCT-BLK-M) requires a 4-star review containing the keyword 'sizing down'. Three WooCommerce settings must be enabled: woocommerce_enable_reviews, woocommerce_enable_review_rating, and woocommerce_review_rating_required (all set to 'yes'). All data is synthetic and created within the task environment via programmatic product creation and user-driven review submission.
